ModMetaData.name: The Antagonist
ModMetaData.author: wishRobber
ModMetaData.description:
The Antagonist is a custom AI storyteller for RimWorld - a new face on the Choose AI Storyteller screen alongside Cassandra Classic, Phoebe Chillax and Randy Random.
Right now The Antagonist plays exactly like Cassandra: a steady, escalating storyteller that pushes your colony with raids, threats and events on a classic rising curve of challenge and tension, then eases off, then pushes again. It ships with a placeholder portrait and is built as a clean starting point for a fully bespoke storyteller - future updates will give it its own personality, event pacing and difficulty feel.
Pure-XML StorytellerDef, no dependencies, and safe to add to or remove from any save at any time. Pairs perfectly with the Improved Defaults mod, which can pre-select The Antagonist automatically for every new game.
Keywords: custom storyteller, AI storyteller mod, new storyteller, difficulty, events, raids.
